programme.title: Some Came Running
programme.desc: An ex-GI writer (Frank Sinatra) hangs out with a gambler (Dean Martin) and a floozy (Shirley MacLaine) in his hometown. Starring Frank Sinatra, Dean Martin, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: Based on John Steinbecks novel about the relationship between a migrant worker and his slow-witted friend. Starring Burgess Meredith, Lon Chaney, Betty Field.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Cities

programme.title: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Dickens orphan Pip (John Mills) goes to London to become a gentleman, thanks to his anonymous benefactor. Starring John Mills, Valerie Hobson, Bernard Miles.

programme.title: Tom Jones
programme.desc: Henry Fieldings lusty foundling hero (Albert Finney) meets a series of attractive women in 18th-century England. Starring Albert Finney, Susannah York, Hugh Griffith.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A womans unquenchable thirst for romance ultimately proves to be her undoing. Based on Gustave Flauberts novel. Starring Jennifer Jones, Van Heflin, Louis Jourdan.

programme.desc: Two vacuum-cleaner salesmen (Jimmy Durante, Phil Silvers) call on an Army recruiter and wind up enlisted. Starring Jimmy Durante, Jane Wyman, Phil Silvers.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dressed to Chill
programme.desc: Romeo and Bullethead lead a protest against school uniforms after Steve makes a rousing speech about students rights.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Honeymooners
programme.desc: When Cedrics honeymoon plans fall through, he tries to tag along with Steve and the gang on a free trip to Florida.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - When the Funk Hits the Big 4-0
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) is gripped by a midlife crisis as he turns 40; Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) finds love with a basketball player (guest star Dwayne Adway).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Player, Interrupted
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) books Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) as performers at a charity event held in a mental hospital.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Seville
programme.desc: The Harlem Globetrotters, Too Tall and Jet land in Seville on a quest to learn about the Moorish Empires history, leaving a lasting impression on Spains architecture!

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Mexico City
programme.desc: Join the Harlem Globetrotters on a whirlwind adventure through Mexico City! They dive into ancient tales by gliding along historic canals and soaring over majestic pyramids. Next, they feast like royals in a one-of-a-kind cave restaurant.

programme.title: Between Sisters
programme.desc: A bride and her sister set out to find their newly discovered siblings in order to invite them to the wedding.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.desc: Do you spend too many hours sitting at a desk? Do you have a tough time exercising due to joint pain? Ellipse Fit will strengthen your legs, boost mobility, and improve circulation with low impact leg movement. Order NOW And claim your FREE Bonus!

programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - The General Muir
programme.desc: With Noshes and bagels and beef, Chef Kristol Bryant puts a brasserie style delicatessen to the test.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Sebastian Pintxos Bar
programme.desc: The vibrancy of Spain explored through the inspired dishes of one female chef.

programme.desc: A male love expert attempts to use his methods to woo a female romance guru for a book, only to find he actually knows nothing about love.

programme.title: If You Really Love Me
programme.desc: The deceased mother of three women returns to Earth as an angel to help them rediscover what is truly important in life.

programme.title: Family Time - Unhappy Anniversary
programme.desc: Tony attempts to spark the flame of romance for his and Lisas upcoming anniversary. Lisa takes a hands-on approach to being in her childrens life.

programme.title: Family Time - Stallworth vs. Stallworth vs. Stallworth
programme.desc: With Tony and Lisa at odds, Ebony fears disappointing them and takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Family Time - No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Even with Ebonys return, tempers continue to flare between Tony and Lisa.

programme.title: Family Time - Thanks For Giving
programme.desc: Devin makes a new friend and shows the real meaning of the season.

programme.title: Family Time - Daddie Donnie
programme.desc: When Tony shares common interests with Ebony, Devin turns to Uncle Donnie for quality time; Lisa is swindled into purchasing a time-share.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Here to Stay
programme.desc: Bernie learns the kids are staying long-term and sets ground rules.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When Bryanna brings home a stray dog, the children hide it until Christmas Day, figuring Bernie will allow them to keep it.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Starting School
programme.desc: Bernie is overwhelmed by the task of getting the children ready for their first day of school; Jordan pretends to be sick, Vanessa refuses to come out of the bathroom and Bryana wants to have her hair braided.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: The pool is being drained and the air conditioner is broken; Bernie takes the children to a water park on the hottest day of the year.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Wandas Week Off
programme.desc: Wanda gets a week of vacation and decides to spend it with the kids.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Steve Dont Get Nun
programme.desc: Steves old flame visits for a benefit, but shocking news prevents the rekindling of their relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - All That Jazz
programme.desc: Steve gets writers block while trying to compose a song for Black History Month; Lovita wants Cedrics forgiveness.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Left Gator
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) uses Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) sympathy to his advantage after hurting his foot moving her couch.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Detention Peddler
programme.desc: A daunting interview for the position of vice principal derails Steves confidence; Cedric pops the question to Lovita.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Snapping and Sniffing
programme.desc: Michael advises Jr. to fight his school bully with words instead of fists; Michael feels Jay is neglecting the family.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Breaking Up and Breaking It
programme.desc: Claire is upset when Michael continues to pal around with her former boyfriend (Andrew McFarlane); Junior spends too much time in the bathroom.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Best Piggys Wedding
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) attempts to win Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) back when he hears she is planning to elope.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love, Death and Basketball
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) consoles Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) when she returns from her honeymoon without the groom.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Touched by a Pig
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) comforts a grieving Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson); Cedrics Grandma Puddin (Cedric The Entertainer) turns a beloved pet into soul food.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Pie
programme.desc: Steve makes scandalous deathbed confessions to Cedric and Regina when he thinks he is having a heart attack.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - He Heard, She Heard
programme.desc: Michael looks to teach Claire a lesson after she sneaks out of the house and uses Kady as an accomplice.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Michaels Garden
programme.desc: Janet convinces Michael to have a procedure during a physical examination.

programme.desc: Chef Don goes toe to toe with Chef Al; todays challenge focuses on the components of whole chicken paired with fennel; the pitmasters must artfully integrate Flo wine into their dish.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Sausage and Tomato
programme.desc: Chef Jazzuri and Chef Stanzee throw down in the semifinal match; sausage and tomato are on the menu today, but the contestants must also integrate blackberry Merlot jam into their dishes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Pork Belly and Rice
programme.desc: The first round of the finals has arrived; Chef Stanzee faces off against Chef Al; the challenge is cooking up pork belly with a side of rice.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Vegan BBQ and Mango
programme.desc: Stanzee and Al look to seal their win and leave it all out in the arena; vegan BBQ with a side of mango is on the menu.

programme.title: In the Meantime
programme.desc: Soon to be married, a bride (Kali Hawk) finds that her friendship with a fellow volunteer (Darrin Dewitt Henson) at an adult-literacy program is developing into something much more intense.

programme.title: From This Day Forward
programme.desc: Patrice (Essence Atkins) and Corrine (Vanessa Simmons), two sexy and confident women in great relationships, have to learn tough lessons about trust and fidelity to make their love last.

programme.title: Family Time - Every Cloud Has A Silver Lining
programme.desc: Tony believes Rachel and Lori are trying to make a pass at him; Lisa thinks her new Spanish tutor is trying to teach her more than the language of love.

programme.title: Family Time - Girls Getaway

programme.title: Family Time - Merry Kwanzaa

programme.title: Family Time - Sick Of This

programme.title: Family Time - There Goes the Neighborhood

programme.desc: Bernie tries to show the children who is the king of the castle after he realizes everything he says to them goes through Vanessa first.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Jordan goes out for football in hopes of winning a trophy for the Bernie Mac Hall of Fame awards shelf; former Oakland Raiders running back Marcus Allen, MVP of Super Bowl XVIII stars.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Handle Your Business
